text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I ought to have expected this, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(I've no reason to assume she'll be this way
forever, but neither can I expect a change to
simply occur unprovoked. This will be our normal,
for the moment at least...)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Many Umamusume strive to realize their dreams
alongside close rivals—encouraging one another
to endure and improve.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Though, if I were to suggest that Sirius and I
foster such a relationship, I'd be met with a snort
and little else.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (...What am I to do?)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm. A peculiar quandary, and to be mine of all people. It's as if I'm fretting over the trials and tribulations of making my very first friend.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What an adorable thing for you to be worried
about.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki. ...You were listening?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
To your Sirius-related troubles? I was! I also heard
about the little confrontation you two had the
other day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Into one ear a rumor goes, and out many mouths
it leaves. But to have spread this fast...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We're all very worried, you know. But...
personally, I think your dynamic is fine as it is.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Just as it is now?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Exactly. Come now, surely there's a sort of heat that could only be generated from the friction between you two?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking back to my office after training, I
catch sight of Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you. We meet again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly remember, the last time I saw her, we
discussed her relationship with Sirius Symboli. I
ask how things are going on that front.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, according to Fuji Kiseki, there's something
to be said for the "heat" our dynamic sparks. I've
been mulling that over.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...But it would take something rather dramatic to
inspire a change in our relationship.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even if we had something to reflect on, it would
be difficult to comprehend on mutual terms.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Stand by the fire and you risk getting singed...
Surely, this heat born of our relationship is
corrupted. Could such energy serve as fuel for the
student body, I wonder?
choice_data_list: Why don't you make a demonstration?
I think it all depends on you.
I think it all depends on you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Stand by the fire and you risk getting singed...
Surely, this heat born of our relationship is
corrupted. Could such energy serve as fuel for the
student body, I wonder?
choice_data_list: Why don't you make a demonstration?
I think it all depends on you.
I think it all depends on you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: A demonstration?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It can't be that Sirius Symboli hates Symboli
Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But though I might be confident, I can't provide
proof for someone else's feelings. Still, it's got to
be something different going on.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Something going on that isn't hate... But even if I
were to accept your presumption, Sirius, she...
choice_data_list: Go and let the sparks fly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
You can't have closure if you don't know the
other party's feelings. The best they can do is to
continue butting heads as they speed toward
their goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if their paths don't cross, the strength they
channel from being at odds with each other
should drive them both forward, giving rise to a
heat that isn't corrupt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be a vivid heat that entrances those
watching and entices them to come closer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Trying to accept Sirius's feelings will only
distort matters. Perhaps pure heat is something
plainer, simpler.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I will endeavor to move forward, so
that I might clash with her head-on.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I've reclaimed a firm grasp over what I
must do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf breathes a small sigh of relief and
looks up at the sky. Her expression seems less
clouded than before.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It depends on me? ...Do you mean to say I must
resolve this issue on my own?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter what kind of heat you're up
against. As long as you're ready to deal with it.
choice_data_list: You can either fuel it or cool it down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Any heat, no matter its form, can be changed.
Demonstrate that. Demonstrate that there's
nothing to fear.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So it's a question of how I handle her... Perhaps I
should show everyone my answer, then.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...That's right. That's how I've always done things.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I let people watch from behind as I blaze a trail.
So, for as long as I remain calm and composed,
those around me will remain at ease.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. You're exactly right. Hehe. It appears
that when it comes to Sirius, I can't help but
overheat.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...I shall turn this passion into fuel, so the many
attendees of this academy might spend their time
here with serenity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sporting a cool smile, Symboli Rudolf embodies
dignity perfectly befitting her title of "Emperor."
